title: pteridella angulosa
intro: Pteridella angulosa, also known as the angled fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and roots, which contain bioactive compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pteridella angulosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and improve respiratory health. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
